steps.title: Apply the rearrangement from the given condition
Compute the target value
steps.content: So $2(x-8) = 30$. That matches choice C — C is correct.

steps.title: Use the source rationale
steps.content: Choice C is correct. Subtracting $16$ from both sides of the given equation yields $30=2(x-8)$. Therefore, the value of $2(x-8)$ is $30$.
